_(Optional)_ The transparent-wrapper table to follow. Defaults to [DEFAULT\_TRANSPARENT\_WRAPPERS](./sh-ast-analyze.default_transparent_wrappers.md)<!-- -->. Pass a replacement array to drop a default entry entirely (that wrapper is then treated as an ordinary, non-transparent effective command), or add project-specific entries (e.g. a `with-retry` wrapper) — the table is plain data, not baked-in policy.
